concept: Improvise / An Open Offering of Light
description: To create and perform spontaneously, without preparation, from the inspiration of the present moment. It is a joyful and courageous act of channeling creative flow.
rationale: Composed from the established roots 'pho' (a generative offering), 'li' (light, clarity), and 'a' (openness). The word's structure suggests 'an open offering of light.' This frames improvisation as a spontaneous gift of creative insight, born from and offered into an open, receptive space.
